scripts.dev: bun run --cwd apps/api dev & bun run --cwd apps/web dev & wait
scripts.check: bun run check:lint && bun run check:format && bun run check:types && bash scripts/check-dep-count.sh
scripts.check:full: bun run check && bun test apps --coverage --coverage-threshold 70 && bun audit --audit-level=high && bun run build && bash scripts/check-bundle-size.sh
scripts.check:release: bun run check:full && playwright test && lhci autorun
